overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character walking through a historic New Orleans-style neighborhood. The character travels along sidewalks shaded by live oak trees, crosses a street with 1950s-era traffic, and passes creole cottages and stone walls on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded sidewalk next to stone perimeter wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a tall stone wall, passing under live oak tree canopy

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
large oak trees with sprawling branches creating shade over the street
historic single-story cottages with gabled roofs across the street
ornate black metal street lamp on the left sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded sidewalk bordered by a stone wall on the right and street on the left. Live oak trees create dappled shadows overhead while historic creole cottages line the opposite side of the street. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction.

events.description: character stops at crosswalk to wait for white convertible car to pass before crossing
character begins crossing the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, waiting for traffic to clear, then crossing the street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white vintage convertible driving through the intersection
child in blue dress running ahead to cross the street

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the corner of the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
1950s style white convertible car with red interior

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit intersection as the character approaches a crosswalk. After waiting for a white vintage convertible to pass, the character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians. Historic buildings shift from the left to center of view as the crossing progresses.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street, observing passing traffic

entered.detail: tall modern office building visible on the horizon beyond the historic district
metal wire mesh trash receptacle on the sidewalk
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk on the right side

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a sunnier sidewalk with a clearer view of the city. A distant modern skyscraper rises above the historic rooftops, and palm trees line the avenue. Traffic continues to flow along the multi-lane road to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic neighborhood that transitions from a shaded, intimate street to a bright, open city avenue. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a stone wall, where live oak trees cast dappled shadows over the path and historic creole cottages line the opposite side of the street. As the character approaches a crosswalk, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection, pausing briefly for a white vintage convertible to pass before crossing the street alongside other pedestrians. The view then shifts as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, where the environment expands into a sunnier landscape featuring palm trees and a multi-lane road. Finally, the perspective opens further to reveal a distant modern skyscraper rising above the historic rooftops under a clear sky.
